title: saxifraga hirculus var. major
intro: Saxifraga hirculus var. major is a perennial plant species within the Saxifraga genus, commonly known as the rock saxifrage. Native to Europe and Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Saxifraga hirculus var. major include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
